criteria.label: Install, inspect and uninstall packages with pip.
criteria.example:
```bash
pip install httpx==0.27.2
pip show httpx          # version, location, deps
pip list                # everything installed
pip uninstall httpx
```

criteria.label: Author a requirements.txt with appropriate version specifiers.
criteria.example:
```
httpx==0.27.2          # exact pin (application)
numpy>=1.24,<2         # compatible range (library)
openai~=1.40           # ~= allows patch updates only
```

criteria.label: Recreate an environment with pip install -r and understand pip freeze.
criteria.example:
```bash
pip install -r requirements.txt          # reproduce env
pip freeze > requirements.lock           # snapshot exact set
```
`freeze` lists every installed package (including transitive) at its current version.

criteria.label: Explain why pinning matters and how unpinned deps cause drift.
criteria.example: `openai` (unpinned) installed today gives v1.40; tomorrow PyPI publishes v2.0 with breaking changes — your CI suddenly fails on identical code. `openai==1.40.0` (pinned) gives the same install on every machine, every day, until you choose to upgrade.
